title: Ed Iii
compiled_truth: Ed Iii is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-01-13 to 2001-06-12), Ed Iii sent 9 and received 272 emails, totalling 281 interactions. Top correspondents: [Bob Carter](people/bob-carter) (4), [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (3), [Matt Maxwell](people/matt-maxwell) (3), [Barton Clark](people/barton-clark) (3), [Peter Vecchio](people/peter-vecchio) (3).
